creator: melifaro@ipfw.ru
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/ptlib26,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/147457 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147457
> 
Thanks for submitting PR!
At the moment I've got test versions of ptlib 2.6.7 and opal 3.6.8
ports. The only showstopper is recent Ekiga. I think I'll submit an
update versions of tplib, opal3 and Ekiga in several days
